specs.title: authenticate as admin
LG-01 Login page loads with all required elements
LG-02 Admin tab is active by default
LG-03 Switching to Employee tab changes input type to email
LG-04 Submit with empty fields shows HTML5 validation
LG-05 Invalid admin credentials show error message

LG-07 Password field masks input by default
LG-08 Demo credentials box shows correct admin creds

DB-12 Notification bell in header is clickable

EMP-02 Search by employee name filters results

DPT-07 Departments KPI card on Dashboard

RP-04 Employee role is listed

RP-06 Role designations visible in Employee form dropdown
UM-01 Admin profile name is visible
UM-02 Admin email is pre-filled
UM-03 Admin profile form has phone field
UM-04 Language dropdown has options
UM-05 Timezone dropdown has options
UM-06 Save Changes button is visible
UM-07 Save profile shows success message
UM-08 Security tab is accessible for change password
UM-09 Admin avatar displays "A" in sidebar

RP-02 Report type selector cards are visible

RP-04 Attendance Report is available

RP-06 Leave Report is available

RP-08 Performance Report is available

RP-10 Search filters report rows
RP-11 PDF Download button is visible
RP-12 Excel Download button is visible
RP-13 Table headers visible

NF-01 Notifications page loads
NF-02 KPI summary cards are present
NF-03 Warnings KPI card is visible
NF-04 Success KPI card is visible
NF-05 Info KPI card is visible
NF-06 Alerts KPI card is visible
NF-07 Notification cards are rendered
NF-08 Unread notifications have Mark Read button
NF-09 Mark Read button works on first unread notification
NF-10 Mark All as Read button visible when unread > 0
NF-11 Mark All as Read clears all unread
NF-12 Notification card shows title and message
NF-13 Notification card shows time
NF-14 Bell icon in header navigates to notifications
NF-15 Breadcrumb shows System Notifications
ST-01 Settings page loads
ST-02 Settings side-nav has all tabs
ST-03 Profile tab is active by default
ST-04 Profile form loads with admin details
ST-05 Update profile name and save shows success
ST-06 Company tab loads company settings form
ST-07 Notifications tab shows toggle preferences
ST-08 Appearance tab loads theme settings
ST-09 Theme toggle button is functional
ST-10 Security tab loads change password form
ST-11 Roles & Permissions tab loads
ST-12 Sign Out button is in settings sidenav
ST-13 Breadcrumb shows System Settings
PR-01 Profile tab loads admin profile form
PR-02 Admin avatar "A" is displayed
PR-03 Name field has default admin name
PR-04 Email field is valid email format
PR-05 Phone field is pre-filled
PR-06 Language dropdown defaults to English
PR-07 Timezone dropdown is visible and has options
PR-08 Save Changes button submits and shows confirmation
PR-09 Change Photo button is visible
PR-10 Admin name displayed in header
PR-11 Admin avatar shown in header
PR-12 Sidebar profile chip shows admin info
CP-01 Security tab loads with password-related content
CP-02 Security tab content is rendered
CP-03 Current Password field is present
CP-04 New Password field is present
CP-05 Security section shows 2FA or session info
CP-06 Settings security tab is clickable multiple times
CP-07 Sign Out from settings works
